Layer.OnCommand: %function(self) self:x(SCREEN_CENTER_X-210) self:y(SCREEN_CENTER_Y+(464-253)) self:addy(100) self:sleep(0.5) self:linear(1) self:addy(-100) self:animate(0) GameplayDiffIcon(self,1) end
%function(self) self:x(SCREEN_CENTER_X+210) self:y(SCREEN_CENTER_Y+(464-253)) self:addy(100) self:sleep(0.5) self:linear(1) self:addy(-100) self:animate(0) GameplayDiffIcon(self,2) end

ActorFrame.OnCommand: %function(self) self:stopeffect() if FUCK_EXE then stitch('lua.death').Start() end end
